documentation:
## Aliyun ROS EDSUSER Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as EDSUSER from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-edsuser';
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_edsuser.RosUser.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_edsuser.RosUser.attr_end_user_id
documentation: :Attribute: EndUserId: The name of the end user.

methods.name: ros_cdk_edsuser.RosUser.end_user_id
documentation: :Property: endUserId: The name of the end user. The name must be 3 to 24 characters in length, and can contain lowercase letters, digits, and underscores (_).

methods.name: ros_cdk_edsuser.RosUser.email
documentation: :Property: email: The email address of the end user. The email address is used to receive notifications about events such as desktop assignment. You must specify an email address or a mobile number to receive notifications.

methods.name: ros_cdk_edsuser.RosUser.org_id
documentation: :Property: orgId: The organization to which the end user belongs.

methods.name: ros_cdk_edsuser.RosUser.owner_type
documentation:
:Property:

ownerType: The type of the account ownership.
Enumeration Value:
CreateFromManager
Normal

methods.name: ros_cdk_edsuser.RosUser.password
documentation: :Property: password: The initial password. If this parameter is left empty, an email for password reset is sent to the specified email address.

methods.name: ros_cdk_edsuser.RosUser.phone
documentation: :Property: phone: Mobile numbers are not supported on the international site (alibabacloud.com).

methods.name: ros_cdk_edsuser.RosUser.remark
documentation: :Property: remark: The remarks of the end user.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::EdsUser::User`, which is used to create a convenience user.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `User` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-edsuser-user>

Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_edsuser.User.attr_end_user_id
documentation: Attribute EndUserId: The name of the end user.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::EdsUser::User`, which is used to create a convenience user.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosUser\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-edsuser-user>

methods.name: ros_cdk_edsuser.UserProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `User`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-edsuser-user>

```
param end_user_id

Property endUserId: The name of the end user. The name must be 3 to 24 characters in length, and can contain lowercase letters, digits, and underscores (_).

param email

Property email: The email address of the end user. The email address is used to receive notifications about events such as desktop assignment. You must specify an email address or a mobile number to receive notifications.

param org_id

Property orgId: The organization to which the end user belongs.

param owner_type

Property ownerType: The type of the account ownership. Enumeration Value: CreateFromManager Normal

param password

Property password: The initial password. If this parameter is left empty, an email for password reset is sent to the specified email address.

param phone

Property phone: Mobile numbers are not supported on the international site (alibabacloud.com).

param remark

Property remark: The remarks of the end user.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_edsuser.UserProps.end_user_id
documentation:
Property endUserId: The name of the end user.

The name must be 3 to 24 characters in length, and can contain lowercase letters, digits, and underscores (_).

methods.name: ros_cdk_edsuser.UserProps.email

The email address is used to receive notifications about events such as desktop assignment. You must specify an email address or a mobile number to receive notifications.
